name: transfer_to_number
description: Transfer the caller to a human when they ask to speak to Don, the owner, a manager, or a real person, or when the issue is urgent, sensitive, or outside Mercy's scope.

transfers.condition: When the caller asks to speak to Don, the owner, a manager, or a human, or when the issue is urgent, sensitive, complex, or outside Mercy's scope.
transfers.client_message: Please hold for just a moment while I connect you with Don.
transfers.agent_message: Hi Don, you have an incoming call from a Mercy Speaks Digital caller. They need your assistance.
